EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to enable firewall rule "{object.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to add firewall rule "{object.id}" to the firewall configuration on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Firewall rule "{object.id}" is enabled on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to execute the "{object.value}" operation for firewall rule "{object.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The "{object.value}" operation is executed for firewall rule "{object.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Firewall rule "{object.id}" is disabled on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Firewall rule "{object.id}" is added to the firewall configuration on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to disable firewall rule "{object.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
